data.title: Microservices Design
data.description: Amazon's architecture is built on a microservices design, enhancing scalability and reliability.
data.technical_spec: Loosely coupled services communicating over RESTful APIs.

data.title: Cloud Storage
data.description: Utilizes cloud-based storage solutions to manage data across distributed systems.
data.technical_spec: AWS S3 for scalable data storage and retrieval.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Implements advanced load balancing to process millions of transactions per second.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes AWS Application Load Balancers and Elastic Load Balancing services.

data.title: Content Delivery Network
data.description: Amazon CloudFront is used to deliver content with low latency.
data.technical_spec: Global edge locations for caching and accelerating static and dynamic content.

data.title: Database Solutions
data.description: Relies on both SQL and NoSQL databases for diverse data needs.
data.technical_spec: Amazon RDS for relational data; DynamoDB for key-value storage.
